TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Devin Booker unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u mikilac zikuzay mimaliay. Devin Booker i 2015 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 13, namapili' tu nu Phoenix Suns putiput. 10 a bulad 30 a demiad, 1996 a mihcaan, Devin Booker u kawaw niza sa u miunduay.
S.PHON: də*in bookər unu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u mikir~ɾaʦ zikuzaj mimar~ɾiaj. də*in bookər i **** a miħʦaan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu pħoəni* suns putiput. ** a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦaan, də*in bookər u kawaw niza sa u miunduaj.
S.FORM: Devin Booker unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u mikilac zikuzay mimaliay. Devin Booker i 2015 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 13, namapili' tu nu Phoenix Suns putiput. 10 a bulad 30 a demiad, 1996 a mihcaan, Devin Booker u kawaw niza sa u miunduay.
S.PHON: də*in bookər unu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, u mikir~ɾaʦ zikuzaj mimar~ɾiaj. də*in bookər i **** a miħʦaan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu pħoəni* suns putiput. ** a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦaan, də*in bookər u kawaw niza sa u miunduaj.
